title: carphephorus carnosus
intro: Carphephorus carnosus, also known as Florida orangered, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Carphephorus carnosus include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties.
